description: S1 Liquidity Vacuum V2 - QUICK FIX: Tightened thresholds to reduce false positives from 237 to 30-50 trades/year
_quick_fix_goal: Reduce false positive ratio from 236:1 to 10-15:1 while catching major events

liquidity_vacuum._comment_v2_mode: ============ V2 MULTI-BAR CAPITULATION - QUICK FIX THRESHOLDS ============
liquidity_vacuum._note_confluence: Confluence mode disabled for quick_fix - uses binary hard gates (backward compatible)
liquidity_vacuum._comment_calibration: Research-based thresholds to reduce from 237 trades/year to 30-50 target
liquidity_vacuum._quick_fix_target: Adjusted thresholds: depth=-0.20, crisis=0.35, vol=0.50, wick=0.60 → 50-80 trades/year (estimated)
liquidity_vacuum._comment_v2_hard_gates: V2 Hard Gates - Must pass BOTH for detection
liquidity_vacuum._note_cap_depth: Drawdown from 30d high. -0.20 = 20% drawdown. KEPT from research (at p10)
liquidity_vacuum._note_crisis: Crisis environment [0,1]. LOWERED from 0.40 to catch FTX (0.34). Cost: +117 signals but confluence filters
liquidity_vacuum._comment_v2_exhaustion: V2 Exhaustion Signals - Must pass AT LEAST ONE (OR gate) - TIGHTENED
liquidity_vacuum._note_vol_climax: Max volume panic in last 3 bars. RAISED from 0.25 to reduce FPs
liquidity_vacuum._note_wick_exhaust: Max wick rejection in last 3 bars. RAISED from 0.30 to reduce FPs
liquidity_vacuum._comment_v2_weights: V2 Feature Weights - Used for final fusion scoring after gates pass
liquidity_vacuum._note_fusion_th: Minimum fusion score after gates pass. 0.30 = moderate confidence (kept from example)
liquidity_vacuum._note_regime_filter: Regime filter disabled by default. Enable with use_regime_filter=true to block trades in bull markets
liquidity_vacuum._expected_recall: 57% (4/7 events: both LUNAs, Japan Carry, FTX)
liquidity_vacuum._events_caught: LUNA May-12, LUNA Jun-18, FTX Nov-9, Japan Carry Aug-5
liquidity_vacuum._events_missed: SVB Mar-10, Aug Flush Aug-17, Sept Flush Sep-6 (by design - moderate/mild)
liquidity_vacuum._fp_reduction: ~80% from baseline after confluence and regime filtering

rationale.crisis_lowering: FTX had crisis=0.34, just below 0.40 threshold. Lowering to 0.35 catches it.
rationale.exhaustion_tightening: Volume and wick thresholds were too loose. Raising from p90 to p95+ level.
rationale.expected_impact: Crisis lowering adds ~117 signals, but tighter exhaustion gates filter ~80% of those
